title: Qatar Is Not Mediating U.S.-Iran Talks, Foreign Minister Says
summary_full: Qatar’s Foreign Ministry warned that the regional security system has been shattered, as the war has destroyed trust between Gulf countries and Iran.
summary_public: Qatar’s Foreign Ministry warned that the regional security system has been shattered, as the war has destroyed trust between Gulf countries and Iran.
